---
title: "Team"
---

## Members
- Brayden Hamilton — data cleaning, EDA (data cleaning, EDA, modeling, writing)
- Sofia Haider — data cleaning, EDA
- Lojy Hozyen — data cleaning, EDA
- Raymond Truong — modeling, writing
- Michael Ezeogu - modeling, writing

## Collaboration rules (simple)
- Pull before you start work.
- Commit small changes with clear messages.
- Only one person edits the *same* `.qmd` file at a time.
- Use Issues (optional) for tasks/bugs.
